name: Piaui (Brazil)

colors.symbolism: the sky; field of the canton
peace; field of the star and the inscription

description: Thirteen equal horizontal stripes alternating green and yellow, with a blue canton in the upper hoist bearing a single white five-pointed star above the inscription 13 DE MARCO DE 1823.
history: Adopted on 24 July 1922 by State Decree No. 1.050; the canton commemorates the Battle of Jenipapo of 13 March 1823, fought during the consolidation of Brazilian independence.

features.symbolism: Thirteen horizontal stripes alternating green and yellow, the colours of Brazil; the count recalls the thirteen original American colonies as a republican reference
Blue canton bearing a single white star and the date 13 March 1823
13 DE MARCO DE 1823, the date of the Battle of Jenipapo, in which Piaui forces fought for Brazilian independence
